# Terraform production placeholder

Public initial commit does not include a production environment implementation.

The public tree starts with a staging example only. Production can be added later by copying the staging structure, replacing documentation/example values, and keeping state, tfvars, kubeconfig, and secrets outside the repository.

Do not copy the current private production files into the public candidate tree.
